mapper.delete: DELETE FROM yd_customerflow WHERE DATEDIFF(DAY, insertDate, GETDATE()) = 0
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO yd_customerflow (id, storeIdUuid, storeCode, name, realTime, indoorCount, outdoorCount, statDimensionDayTime, statDimensionHourTime, outsum, areaCode, areaName, storeAreaIdUuid, insertDate) VALUES
(#{item.id}, #{item.storeIdUuid}, #{item.storeCode}, #{item.name}, #{item.realTime}, #{item.indoorCount}, #{item.outdoorCount}, #{item.statDimensionDayTime}, #{item.statDimensionHourTime}, #{item.outsum}, #{item.areaCode}, #{item.areaName}, #{item.storeAreaIdUuid}, GETDATE())
